evaluations.title: Оі сосно, сосно, де ж ти росла
evaluations.comment: The translation conveys the overall narrative and structure, but partially loses the folkloric style and ritual functions

evaluations.title: Оі даі, мати, масла
evaluations.comment: Loss of folkloric formulaicity (e.g., “Give me some butter for the scythe / Give me some butter or lard”).

evaluations.title: Оі учора ізвечора
evaluations.comment: The translation partially conveys the meaning, but contains several inaccuracies and loses important folkloric features: formulaic repetition, rhythm, and dialectal elements are weakened, and some lexical choices (“growl”).

evaluations.title: Оі господаріу міі
evaluations.comment: "господарь" is a ritual word; the better will be "my good host".

evaluations.title: Хоч течи, пивонко, хоч не течи
evaluations.comment: Diminutive forms have been replaced with neutral ones, ritual terms (коровай) have been rendered as more common expressions.

evaluations.title: Добрї вечір, мамуненку
evaluations.comment: The overall meaning is conveyed, but the folkloric style is partially lost.

evaluations.title: Ходит батичко рідненкї
evaluations.comment: Some minor hallucinations are present, including semantic shifts (e.g., “asking the servants”) and added elements (e.g., “everyone”), which are not explicit in the original text.

evaluations.title: А попід лісок
evaluations.comment: The meaning is preserved, but there are stylistic inaccuracies.

evaluations.title: Оі ішли ми та и на короваіец
Оі де ж таіа вісілнаіа мати
Коліад, коліад, коліадниціа
evaluations.comment: It’s a carol, a winter song, not a wedding song

evaluations.title: Обсипаіеціа жовтеіе листіа
evaluations.comment: It’s a modern song, from the 20th century

evaluations.title: Короваінички з міста
evaluations.comment: Semantic hallucination in the last line

evaluations.title: Печу, печу хлібчик
evaluations.comment: This is a children's song, missing diminutive forms

evaluations.title: Куди б иа не їхала
evaluations.comment: This is a modern wedding song from the 20th century. The model handles basic semantics well but loses formulaic structure and fails to reproduce ritual language.
